titlestmt.titleproper: Van Santvoord and Olcott family papers2373

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Van Santvoord and Olcott family papers
did.abstract: Miscellaneous business, financial, and legal records of Alfred Van Santvoord, his family (and in-laws), Jacob and Anna Lansing; her father, Absalom Townsend.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Miscellaneous business, financial, and legal records of Alfred Van Santvoord; his wife, Anna Van Santvoord; Mrs. Van Santvoord's maternal grandparents, Jacob and Anna Lansing; her father, Absalom Townsend; the Van Sanvoord's son-in-law, Eben Erskine Olcott; their great-grandson, Alfred Van Sanvoord Olcott. The papers of the Lansings include deeds to property in Montgomery County and court briefs (ca. 1819-1829); the Van Santvoord and Olcott records include administrative, fiscal, and legal papers and photographs relating to Alfred Van Sanvoord's investments in the Hudson River Line and several railroads in eastern New York.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Van Santvoord and Olcott family papers, #2373. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Railroads -- New York (State).
Real property -- New York (State) -- Montgomery County.

Families -- New York (State).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.
